steps.title: Set up the probability
steps.content: $P(\text{at least 45}) = \dfrac{\text{members aged 45+}}{\text{total members}}$. From the table, the total is $135$ members.

steps.title: Read the favorable count
steps.content:
Adding all members who are at least $45$ years old (across both north and south of Center St.) gives $114$. So the probability is $\dfrac{114}{135}$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
